questions.question: What city offered the first pay toilets, in 1865?
Who had fat cells from his butt injected around his eyes and forehead before a TV studio audience?

What stimulant do 8 out of 10 in the U.S. consume 200 milligrams of every day?
What Gillette product's ads had Scottie Pippen and Emmitt Smith say "Anything less would be uncivilized"?
